input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for fixDirectoryLimit.
input_context.outcome_question: Recommend the XRP-native YES/NO vote/outcome for this named decision surface from pre-outcome facts only.

source_facts.claim: fixDirectoryLimit: This amendment removes the directory page limit. Object reserve requirements provide enough incentive to avoid creating unnecessary objects on the XRP Ledger.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
fixDirectoryLimit appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 2.6.2.
